steps.title: Identify what the underlined sentence does
steps.content:
The underlined sentence reads: "Mary Beth Wilhelm and other astrobiologists search for life, or its remains, in this harsh place because the desert closely mirrors the extreme environment on Mars."

The word because signals a causal relationship — it explains the reason scientists chose the Atacama Desert. The sentence is not describing conditions in the desert or limitations on research; it is giving the motivation for conducting research there.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice, then confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'To contrast the conditions in the Atacama Desert with those on Mars': The sentence says the desert "closely mirrors" Mars — that is similarity, not contrast. ✗
  • Choice B — 'To explain why many life-forms cannot survive in the Atacama Desert': The sentence explains why astrobiologists choose to study there, not why life cannot survive there. ✗
  • Choice C — 'To indicate why astrobiologists choose to conduct research in the Atacama Desert': The "because" clause gives the causal motivation — the desert mirrors Mars, so scientists study it to learn about Martian life. ✓
  • Choice D — 'To describe certain limitations to conducting scientific study in the Atacama Desert': No limitations are mentioned in the underlined sentence; it explains a reason, not a barrier. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
